name: Painting
title: AI Tools for Painting Companies | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for painting companies — quote jobs fast, follow up on estimates, and keep crews scheduled. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month.
hero_lede: Painting is a quoting business — lots of estimates, lots of follow-up, a short window when the customer is deciding. We build the tools that quote fast and follow up so more of those decisions go your way.
drains: A steady stream of estimate requests to schedule and walk
Quotes that go quiet with no structured follow-up
Crew scheduling that shifts with weather and job length
The owner walking estimates all day, then doing admin all night

tools.title: Estimate-request assistant
tools.body: Every inquiry gets an instant reply, the job scoped — interior or exterior, square footage, surfaces — and a walk-through booked, so the estimate pipeline stays full.

tools.title: Quote follow-up assistant
tools.body: Every estimate gets a polite, well-timed follow-up while the customer is still deciding — the difference between a 30% and a 50% close rate.

tools.title: Estimate drafter
tools.body: From your walk-through notes, it drafts a clean estimate — prep, coats, materials, labor — so quotes go out the same day instead of two days later.

tools.title: Morning crew brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's jobs, crew assignments, materials to load, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.before: Estimates went out and then sat; no one tracked which prospects had gone cold.
cases.after: Every open quote followed up automatically while the customer was still deciding.
cases.impact: Representative result: a meaningful lift in quote-to-close rate with no extra owner effort.

cases.context: A painting company with slow quote turnaround.
cases.before: Quotes were written after-hours and often went out two days late.
cases.after: Drafts ready for a quick review right after the walk-through.
cases.impact: Representative result: same-day quotes and more jobs won on speed.

faq.q: Can it follow up without sounding pushy?
faq.a: Yes. The follow-ups are polite, well-timed, and written in your voice. Most owners review the cadence once and let it run — it just makes sure no quote is forgotten.

faq.q: Does it handle interior and exterior jobs?
faq.a: Yes. It scopes each inquiry by job type, square footage, and surfaces, and drafts estimates accordingly.

faq.q: Will it work with my CRM?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of whatever you use to track leads and estimates.
